scope_note: QA Neuberg Cubic F23 Cert family [242]: packages the pre-verified Wildberger finite-field Neuberg bridge. The validator exhaustively counts E(F_23) for y^2=x^3+x+1 as 27 affine points plus one point at infinity, checks two Weierstrass tangent-conic witnesses by enumerating F_23 point sets and requiring identical or disjoint relation only, records an integer-polynomial spread pair, and asserts p=23 compatibility with char not 2 or 3. Source: Wildberger, Neuberg cubics over finite fields, arXiv:0806.2495, 2008; Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-14. Checks NCF23_1+POINT_COUNT/TANGENT_CONIC_DICHOTOMY/SPREAD_POLYNOMIAL/QA_COMPAT/SRC/F; 1 PASS + 1 FAIL; self-test ok
